name: Bacterium Omentum
description: Expensive Bacterium. Base 4,638,900 cr, ×5 = 23,194,500 cr. Tied to volcanism — Nitrogen/Methane atmospheres.

description_ru: Дорогой Bacterium. База 4,638,900 cr, ×5 = 23,194,500 cr. Связан с вулканизмом — атмосферы Nitrogen/Methane.
